DEPARTMENT 608. VISITING JUDGE JOHN BIBLE. D. CARTER, CLERK. SONIA WONG, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: ATTORNEYS FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, LARRY SHOCKEY AND ANDRES L. WILLIAMS. PLAINTIFF DARLENE BARNETT ALSO PRESENT. DEFENSE WITNESSES THOMAS J. MCVEY AND THOMAS DENNIS MURTAUGH ALSO PRESENT. C/C FOR CONTD. JURY TRIAL. DEFENSE CASE IN CHIEF PRESENTED. DEFENSE WITNESSES, SWORN AND EXAMINED. DEFENSE EXHIBITS, I.D. AND EVID. DEFENSE RESTS. PLTF. RESTS. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY PLAINTFF AND DEFENSE COUNSEL. JURY INSTRUCTED BY COURT. BAILIFF SWORN. JURY RETIRES TO JURY ROOM TO DELIBERATE. ALTERNATE JURORS ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. JURY RETURNED TO COURT WITH VERDICT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. JURY POLLED. TWELVE VERDICTS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. JURORS DISCHARGED, THANKED, AND EXCUSED FROM FURTHER JURY SERVICE BY JUDGE BIBLE. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN AND RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE COUNSEL.
